news.t: Score World Cup Investing Goals With This ETF
Inflation has peaked — now it's time to go bargain shopping for consumer-discretionary stocks
ETF Wrap: As AMC's stock surged, an Invesco ‘reopening' fund sold shares of the meme because that is how the smart-beta ETF works
Market Extra: AMC Entertainment's stock surge ripples through these ETFs
This ETF's assets have grown 3,000% in a year as investors embrace the reopening trade
Shares of department store retailers and restaurant companies jump after COVID-19 trial news

holdings.infoBox: PEJ is an equity ETF with a total of 33 individual holdings. The top holdings are Marriott International stock at 5.11%, Hilton Worldwide Holdings at 5.07%, Viking Holdings at 4.99%, Sysco at 4.99%, and Las Vegas Sands at 4.83%.

overview.description: The Invesco Leisure and Entertainment ETF (PEJ) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in consumer discretionary equity. The fund tracks a multi-factor, tiered equal-weighted index of US entertainment and leisure industry stocks. PEJ was launched on Jun 23, 2005 and is issued by Invesco.
